name: Manual Tool Changer
author: ncSender
description: Manual tool change workflow with Tool Length Setter (TLS) support.

LOAD_MESSAGE_MANUAL.title: Loading
LOAD_MESSAGE_MANUAL.message: Please install {toolNumber} securely, then click "Continue" to proceed or "Abort" to cancel.

UNLOAD_MESSAGE_MANUAL.title: Unloading
UNLOAD_MESSAGE_MANUAL.message: Please remove the current bit, then click "Continue" to proceed or "Abort" to cancel.

SWAP_MESSAGE_MANUAL.title: Tool Change
SWAP_MESSAGE_MANUAL.message: Please remove the current bit and install {toolNumber} securely, then click "Continue" to proceed or "Abort" to cancel.

LOAD_MESSAGE.title: Loading
LOAD_MESSAGE.message: Confirm {toolNumber} is placed securely in the pocket and keep hands clear. Click "Continue" to proceed or "Abort" to cancel.

LOAD_AFTER_MANUAL_MESSAGE.title: Tool Change
LOAD_AFTER_MANUAL_MESSAGE.message: Remove the current bit and confirm {toolNumber} is placed securely in the pocket. Keep hands clear. Click "Continue" to proceed or "Abort" to cancel.

UNLOAD_MESSAGE.title: Unloading
UNLOAD_MESSAGE.message: Ensure the pocket is empty and keep hands clear. Click "Continue" to proceed or "Abort" to cancel.
